scope_note: QA Sefer Yetzirah Combinatorics Cert family [203]: certifies the combinatorial structures in the Sefer Yetzirah (Book of Formation, c. 2nd-6th century CE) as QA-compatible discrete mathematics: 231 gates = C(22,2) = K_22 complete graph, factorial computation (n! for n=2..7), 3-7-12 letter partition, 32 paths = 10+22, oscillating circle as cyclic structure, and the Pythagorean transmission path via Iamblichus/Mount Carmel.
